title: SOX / ITGC — TACACS+ Privileged-Command Audit on Network Devices

compliance.assurance_rationale: PCAOB AS 5 paragraphs B27-B29 require evidence over IT general controls. UC-17.1.43 produces continuous evidence of TACACS+ command authorization for privileged commands (config erase, AAA weakening, logging suppression) on financially-significant network devices.
compliance.controlObjective: Demonstrate that privileged commands on network devices supporting financial systems are logged via TACACS+ command authorization with full attribution.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search 'UC-22.12.42' archiving high-risk TACACS+ command events to `audit_evidence` with `sox_clause=AS5.B27-B29`.

app: Splunk Enterprise Security (263) + Splunk Add-on for Cisco Identity Services (1915).
spl:
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (11042, 11043) earliest=-1d
| where match(command, "(?i)(write erase|no aaa|no logging|enable secret|config replace)")
| eval sox_clause="AS5.B27-B29", control="Privileged_Command_Audit"
| table _time, user, device_ip, command, command_authz_result, sox_clause
| collect index=audit_evidence
description: We continuously evidence SOX ITGC over privileged commands on financially-significant network devices.
value: Network device privileged commands (config erase, AAA weakening) directly impact the integrity of segregation supporting financial systems. SOX auditors need continuous attribution.
implementation: Schedule the saved search daily at 06:00 local time; archive results to the `audit_evidence` summary index for SOX/ITGC PCAOB AS 2201 evidence.
visualization: SOX ITGC dashboard: privileged command timeline; user-to-device matrix.

references.title: UC-17.1.43 — Cisco ISE TACACS+ Privileged Command Audit

knownFalsePositives: 1. Approved planned changes via change-management ticket — annotate the alert with ticket reference.
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.43 operational.
- TACACS+ enabled on financially-significant network devices.
- `audit_evidence` with 7y retention.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.12.42: SOX ITGC — TACACS+ Privileged Command Audit]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.12.42,reg=SOX,clause=AS5.B27-B29
```

Quarterly review with SOX auditor.
grandmaExplanation: We continuously evidence SOX ITGC over privileged commands on financially-significant network devices. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Issue 'no aaa new-model' on a financially-significant switch. Evidence captured.

evidence: Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with SOX AS5 tagging.
